song.title: Fuck This Shit
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Fuck This Shit' from Cowboys EP by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Fuck This Shit Lyrics - Cowboys EP
og.description: Full lyrics to Fuck This Shit from Cowboys EP.

twitter.title: Fuck This Shit Lyrics - Agust Islandia
twitter.description: Full official lyrics for Fuck This Shit.

essay: Fuck This Shit opens Cowboys EP with blunt frustration at app-era loneliness in rural queer life. Its anger is comic on the surface and deeply vulnerable underneath.
song.lyricsHtml:
Fuck this shit, I shout into the night
Cowboy heart wants some love, but the app don't swipe right
Swipe left, swipe right, but it all feels wrong
Lonely on the prairie, where I don't belong

Fuck this shit
Boots up on the railing, beer in my hand
Signal keeps on failing out here on the land
Profile after profile, tumbleweed road

Looking for a cowboy who could fill my soul
Every swipe's a stranger, every match is a ghost
Chasing cowboy dreams out here with no toast
I ain't asking for diamonds, just a man who's true

But this damn old app don't know what to do
Fuck this shit, I shout into the night
Cowboy heart wants some love, but the app don't swipe right
Swipe left, swipe right, but it all feels wrong

Lonely on the prairie, where I don't belong
Saw a cowboy profile looking fine on the pic
Met him down in town, turned out it was a trick
No horse, no hat, just some city boy's bluff

I bought the first round, then he ran out of luck
Every swipe's a stranger, every match is a ghost
Chasing cowboy dreams out here with no toast
Thought I found a rider, but he weren't that tough

City boy pretended, but I've had enough
Fuck this shit, I shout into the night
Cowboy heart wants some love, but the app don't swipe right
Met a city boy bluffing, thought it might turn out fine

He gave me a little head, but he weren't really mine
Throw my phone in the fire, let the desert decide
Cowboy needs a true man, riding by his side
No more ghosting profiles, no more pixel dreams

I'll take whiskey and the prairie over swiping machines
Now I'm riding solo, but I'm holding my ground
Ain't no app gonna tell me where love can be found
If a real cowboy's out there, he can meet me halfway

Let the campfire glow at the end of the day
